---
title: "Filtered Probe Sets Summary"
author: "Dr. Ali Al-Timimi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: true
params:
  res_1: NULL
  res_2: NULL
  annots_1: NULL
  annots_2: NULL
  chip_1: "hu35ksuba"
  chip_2: "hu6800"
  eset_1: NULL
  eset_2: NULL
  save_plots: FALSE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=5)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(pheatmap)
library(Rtsne)
library(entropy)
library(glue)
library(dplyr)
```

# Overview 

This report summarizes filtered probe sets for the following chip types:

*  Affymetrix Human Genome HU35K Set (`r params$chip_1`) 
*  Affymetrix Hu6800 Array (`r params$chip_2`)


# 🧬 Probe Comparison Summary

```{r summary, echo=FALSE}
count_1 <- nrow(params$res_1$limma_full)
count_2 <- nrow(params$res_2$limma_full)

probes_1 <- unique(params$res_1$filtered_probes)
probes_2 <- unique(params$res_2$filtered_probes)

shared_probes <- intersect(probes_1, probes_2)
unique_1 <- setdiff(probes_1, probes_2)
unique_2 <- setdiff(probes_2, probes_1)

comparison_lines <- c(
  glue("🔍 Limma Probe Comparison Summary — {Sys.time()}"),
  "------------------------------------------------------",
  glue("Chip 1 ({params$chip_1}): Total probes: {count_1} | Filtered: {length(probes_1)}"),
  glue("Chip 2 ({params$chip_2}): Total probes: {count_2} | Filtered: {length(probes_2)}"),
  glue("Shared probes: {length(shared_probes)}"),
  glue("Unique to {params$chip_1}: {length(unique_1)}"),
  glue("Unique to {params$chip_2}: {length(unique_2)}"),
  "------------------------------------------------------"
)

cat(paste(comparison_lines, collapse = "\n"))

```

# 📊 Visualizations

## UpSet Plot: Probe Overlap

```{r upset_plot, echo=FALSE}
all_probes <- union(params$res_1$filtered_probes, params$res_2$filtered_probes)
probe_matrix <- tibble::tibble(
  probe_id = all_probes,
  !!params$chip_1 := all_probes %in% params$res_1$filtered_probes,
  !!params$chip_2 := all_probes %in% params$res_2$filtered_probes
)

ComplexUpset::upset(
  probe_matrix,
  intersect = c(params$chip_1, params$chip_2),
  name = "Probe Presence",
  width_ratio = 0.2,
  set_sizes = FALSE
)

```

## GO Molecular Function Enrichment

```{r go_terms, echo=FALSE}
go1 <- params$annots_1$go_counts |> mutate(chip = params$chip_1)
go2 <- params$annots_2$go_counts |> mutate(chip = params$chip_2)
go_combined <- bind_rows(go1, go2)

go_names <- bind_rows(
  params$annots_1$annotation_table |> dplyr::select(GO, go_name),
  params$annots_2$annotation_table |> dplyr::select(GO, go_name)
) |> distinct()

go_combined <- left_join(go_combined, go_names, by = "GO")

threshold <- quantile(go_combined$n_probes, 0.95)
go_filtered <- go_combined |> filter(n_probes >= threshold)

ggplot(go_filtered, aes(x = reorder(go_name, n_probes), y = n_probes, fill = chip)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = glue("GO Molecular Function Enrichment \n (≥ 95th percentile, n ≥ {threshold})"),
    x = "GO Term", y = "Number of Probes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

## Heatmaps of Shared Probes

```{r heatmaps, echo=FALSE}
shared_probes <- intersect(params$res_1$filtered_probes, params$res_2$filtered_probes)

if (length(shared_probes) >= 5 &&
    !is.null(params$eset_1) && !is.null(params$eset_2)) {
  
  scale_matrix <- function(mat) t(scale(t(mat)))
  
  get_labels <- function(probes, annot_tbl) {
    annot_map <- annot_tbl |>
      filter(PROBEID %in% probes) |>
      mutate(label = ifelse(
        is.na(SYMBOL) | SYMBOL == "",
        PROBEID,
        glue::glue("{SYMBOL} [{PROBEID}]")
      )) |>
      distinct(PROBEID, label)
    
    labels <- annot_map$label[match(probes, annot_map$PROBEID)]
    labels[is.na(labels)] <- probes[is.na(labels)]
    setNames(labels, probes)
  }
  
  labels_1 <- get_labels(shared_probes, params$annots_1$annotation_table)
  labels_2 <- get_labels(shared_probes, params$annots_2$annotation_table)
  
  mat1 <- scale_matrix(params$res_1$filtered_matrix[shared_probes, ])
  mat2 <- scale_matrix(params$res_2$filtered_matrix[shared_probes, ])
  
  rownames(mat1) <- labels_1[rownames(mat1)]
  rownames(mat2) <- labels_2[rownames(mat2)]
  
  go_heatmap_1 <- pheatmap(
    mat1,
    main = glue("{params$chip_1} - Shared Probes (Gene Labels)"),
    show_colnames = FALSE
  )
  
  go_heatmap_2 <- pheatmap(
    mat2,
    main = glue("{params$chip_2} - Shared Probes (Gene Labels)"),
    show_colnames = FALSE
  )
  
  # Arrange side-by-side
  # gridExtra::grid.arrange(go_heatmap_1$gtable, go_heatmap_2$gtable, ncol = 2)
  
} else {
  cat("Not enough shared probes or expression sets to generate heatmaps.\n")
}
```

## t-SNE Visualizations

```{r tsne, echo=FALSE}
plot_tsne <- function(res, eset, chip) {
  tsne_res <- Rtsne::Rtsne(t(res$filtered_matrix), perplexity = 30)
  pheno <- Biobase::pData(eset)
  
  p_tsne <- as.data.frame(tsne_res$Y)
  p_tsne$condition <- pheno$condition
  
  ggplot(p_tsne, aes(x = V1, y = V2, color = condition)) +
    geom_point() +
    labs(
      title = glue("t-SNE of Filtered Probes ({chip})"),
      x = "tSNE-1",
      y = "tSNE-2"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

tsne_plot_1 <- plot_tsne(params$res_1, params$eset_1, params$chip_1)
tsne_plot_2 <- plot_tsne(params$res_2, params$eset_2, params$chip_2)

tsne_plot_1 + tsne_plot_2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2) & theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10))

```

## Shannon Entropy Histograms

```{r shannon_entropy, echo=FALSE}
plot_entropy <- function(res, chip) {
  entropies <- apply(res$filtered_matrix, 2, function(x) {
    probs <- table(cut(x, breaks = 10)) / length(x)
    entropy::entropy(probs, unit = "log2")
  })
  df_entropy <- tibble(sample = names(entropies), entropy = entropies)
  mean_entropy <- mean(entropies)
  
  ggplot(df_entropy, aes(x = entropy)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "darkgreen") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = mean_entropy, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    annotate("text", x = mean_entropy, y = Inf, label = "Mean", vjust = 1.1, hjust = 1.1, color = "red") +
    labs(title = glue("Chip {chip} Filtered Expression"),
         x = "Entropy (log2)", y = "Sample count") +
    theme_minimal()
}

shannon_plot_1 <- plot_entropy(params$res_1, params$chip_1)
shannon_plot_2 <- plot_entropy(params$res_2, params$chip_2)

shannon_plot_1 + shannon_plot_2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2) & theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10))

```
